calendar.matters:
Petition For Removal Of Personal Representative And For Appointment Of Administrator
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Off Calendar

Executors Petition For Order Of Court Directing Respondent Lazaro John Fabian To Convey Real Property To Executor As Part Of The Estate Herein Under Probate Code Section 850
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of Personal Representative And For Appointment Of Administrator
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Continued To Apr-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Teresa Main appearing for Lazaro Fabian. Counsel is requesting for continuance. They are waiting for one consent. Matter is continued to 4/25.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

Executors Petition For Order Of Court Directing Respondent Lazaro John Fabian To Convey Real Property To Executor As Part Of The Estate Herein Under Probate Code Section 850
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Continued To Apr-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Executors Petition For Order Of Court Directing Respondent Lazaro John Fabian To Convey Real Property To Executor As Part Of The Estate Herein Under Probate Code Section 850
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Continued To Apr-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Personal Representative And For Appointment Of Administrator
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Continued To Apr-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Louis Giannini appearing for and with executor. Teresa Main appearing for and with Mr. Fabian. Ms. Main will file a petition to declare the 2003 Trust invalid for lack of capacity. She argued that the property is in the Trust and the executor has no standing to file the 850 petition. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 3/28/07. Matter is continued to 4/11/07 for status conference.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of 850 Petition
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Off Calendar

Executors Petition For Order Of Court Directing Respondent Lazaro John Fabian To Convey Real Property To Executor As Part Of The Estate Herein Under Probate Code Section 850
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of 850 Petition
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of 850 Petition
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Continued To Dec-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of 850 Petition
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Continued To Nov-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Personal Representative And Suspension Of Powers Pending Hearing; Petition For Appointment Of Administrator With Will Annexed And Issuance Of Letters Testamentary
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Teresa Jenkins Main appearing for and with Lazaro Fabian. Louis Giannini appearing for and with executor Rudy Valeros. Ms. Main has a response to the executor's status report. Court wants her to file it. Mr. Giannini reports that a partial inventory and appraisal was filed. He has submitted a request for appointment of probate referee. Court asks if he has taken any action to recover the property. Mr. Giannini will file a 850 petition. Ms. Main argued that the executor has not complied with the court's 9/13 order. Court is denying the petition for removal today without prejudice. Status is set on 11/15 for filing of 850 petition. Court wants counsel to appear on 11/15. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Removal Of Personal Representative And Suspension Of Powers Pending Hearing; Petition For Appointment Of Administrator With Will Annexed And Issuance Of Letters Testamentary
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Continued To Oct-25-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Teresa Jenkins Main specially appearing for and with petitioner Lazaro Fabian. Louis Giannini appearing for and with executor Rudy Valeros. Mr. Giannini states that the inventory was not filed because the petitioner has transferred title of the property to himself without authority. Court is concerned that no action was taken for 18 months. Matter is continued to 10/25 for status. If no inventory is filed and no action is taken to have the property returned, Court will remove the executor. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
